name: FIN · Banking — Sample
sql:
SELECT * FROM (VALUES
  ('Northeast', 'Boston Main', 'Mortgage', 142, 28500000, 12000000, 72),
  ('Northeast', 'Boston Main', 'Auto Loan', 310, 8200000, 12000000, 68),
  ('Northeast', 'NYC Midtown', 'Mortgage', 198, 41000000, 19000000, 75),
  ('Northeast', 'NYC Midtown', 'Business Loan', 88, 15600000, 19000000, 71),
  ('Southeast', 'Atlanta Peach', 'Mortgage', 167, 23700000, 9800000, 69),
  ('Southeast', 'Atlanta Peach', 'Auto Loan', 289, 7100000, 9800000, 66),
  ('Southeast', 'Miami Beach', 'Mortgage', 211, 38200000, 16400000, 74),
  ('Midwest', 'Chicago Loop', 'Business Loan', 104, 18900000, 11200000, 70),
  ('Midwest', 'Chicago Loop', 'Auto Loan', 341, 9400000, 11200000, 67),
  ('West', 'LA Downtown', 'Mortgage', 256, 52000000, 22000000, 76),
  ('West', 'SF Financial', 'Business Loan', 119, 24000000, 18000000, 78),
  ('West', 'SF Financial', 'Mortgage', 183, 47000000, 18000000, 79)
) AS t(region, branch, product, new_accounts, loan_volume, deposit_volume, nps_score)
